beats: A film negative is held up to a light source, revealing a basement iron door with the Lin family name written on it.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 底片对着灯，出现一扇地下室铁门，门上写着林家的姓。

prompt.positive: Close-up of a film negative held against a warm light source, revealing a dark basement iron door with Chinese characters '林' on it, high contrast, cinematic grain, shallow depth of field, mysterious atmosphere.
